author: Nintendo of America
text:
Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics – May 2026 Game Updates
Additional classic games for Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics are now available for Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack subscribers.

V-TETRIS®
Jack Bros.
SPACE INVADERS VIRTUAL COLLECTION
VIRTUAL BOWLING
VERTICAL FORCE
